description_long: This is a tall, narrow metal cabinet with a sleek, modern design, commonly found in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public facilities. The front features a glass-paneled door that reveals two wooden shelves inside, providing both visibility and protection for stored items. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground for stability and ease of cleaning underneath. The sides and back are solid metal, offering durability and a clean, industrial appearance. The door appears to have a subtle handle for easy opening, and the glass panel allows for quick identification of contents. The overall finish is smooth and metallic, with a neutral gray color dominating the exterior.
description: Tall, narrow metal cabinet with a glass-paneled front door and two visible wooden shelves inside, standing on four short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass-paneled door and two wooden shelves inside.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid metal panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid metal back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid metal panel, similar to the left side.
